description:
Hi everyone! 
Welcome to SICILY! 
Words cannot describe how incredibly beautiful Sicily was - hopefully the video can capture a bit of it. 
I had so much fun editing this so I hope you guys love 🥰

IMPORTANT TO NOTE if you're planning a roadtrip in Sicily: 
In Palermo airport there is a car rental company called Holiday Rentals that you don't need an international permit to book - HOWEVER - it is a great deal more expensive than if you book online before. If you end up going with one of the other companies, you will need a physical copy of an international driving permit that you'll need to get in your own country before you arrive in Sicily. 
We made the mistake of having an onlne copy only and it was an expensive mistake to make... 

Airbnb in Cefalu we highly recommend: 
https://www.airbnb.com.au/rooms/1348621915832739293?guests=1&c=.pi129.pkpast_trip_share_virality&s=67&unique_share_id=e31b68cd-c548-474e-803d-87a125e85a2d

0:30 Palermo
3:12 Scopello
7:56 Castellemare del Golfo
9:00 Cefalu
18:05 Taormina
32:18 Syracuse/Ortigia
40:09 Marzamemi
41:34 Noto
